title: Report an Issue
step1Desc: Take a clear photo of the problem so AI can identify it.
tapToUpload: Tap to upload or take a photo
step2Desc: Capture your location or pick it on the map.
anythingElse: Anything else to tell the officials?
photoRequired: Please attach a photo of the issue.
voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
saved_offline: Saved offline — will sync when connected.
report_visible_paragraph: Your report (#{id}) is now visible on the municipal dashboard, ranked by priority score {score}.
